context.projectOverview: Sprint 2 of 28. Tier 0 foundation continues: VERBATIM port of two superpowers skills (verification-before-completion, systematic-debugging) into bober.verify and bober.debug, plus inline Iron Law into bober-generator's self-verify section and add a Handling Evaluator Feedback section with Forbidden Responses + DISPUTE protocol.

completedSprints.title: SessionStart bootstrap + bober.using-bober skill
completedSprints.summary: Created hooks/session-start bash hook (modeled on /tmp/superpowers/hooks/session-start), added SessionStart matcher to hooks/hooks.json beside preserved PostToolUse entries, created skills/bober.using-bober/SKILL.md with verbatim voice including <EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT> tags and 14-skill catalog. Commit 03cf904. All 6 criteria passed.

relevantFiles: /tmp/superpowers/skills/verification-before-completion/SKILL.md — port verbatim into skills/bober.verify/SKILL.md with MIT attribution

/tmp/superpowers/skills/systematic-debugging/SKILL.md — port verbatim into skills/bober.debug/SKILL.md with MIT attribution (note: this source dir has many supplementary files like root-cause-tracing.md, condition-based-waiting.md — DO NOT port those here; they go to .bober/anti-patterns/ in Sprint 4)
/tmp/superpowers/skills/receiving-code-review/SKILL.md — reference for the Forbidden Responses block + DISPUTE protocol that goes into bober-generator.md (NOT a new skill)

agents/bober-generator.md — modify: inline Iron Law in self-verify section; add 'Handling Evaluator Feedback' section with Forbidden Responses (>=4 anti-sycophancy phrases) + DISPUTE protocol {dispute: true, criterionId, reason, evidence: Array<{path, line, snippet}>}
skills/bober.using-bober/SKILL.md — created in Sprint 1; this sprint's skills should be consistent with the catalog declared there

criticalNotes: VERBATIM port — preserve <EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT> tags, capitalized Iron Law strings, 'your human partner' phrasing where it appears in source files (skills retain original phrasing; only adapt where bober skill cross-references differ).
Iron Law strings MUST be exact: 'NO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION COMMAND OUTPUT' (bober.verify), 'NO FIXES WITHOUT ROOT CAUSE INVESTIGATION FIRST' (bober.debug).
MIT attribution required at top of each ported file (after YAML frontmatter): cite obra/superpowers and the source SKILL.md path.

DO NOT port the supplementary files in /tmp/superpowers/skills/systematic-debugging/ (testing-anti-patterns.md, root-cause-tracing.md, condition-based-waiting.md, defense-in-depth.md, etc.) — those belong to Sprint 4 (.bober/anti-patterns/).
bober-generator.md modifications: ADD the Iron Law block and the Handling Evaluator Feedback section; DO NOT remove existing instructions. Stay under 800 lines (NFR).
completion-report JSON schema in bober-generator.md must gain verificationOutput field (REQUIRED, not optional): Array<{command: string, exitCode: number, stdoutTail: string}>.

Forbidden Responses block must include at least 4 anti-sycophancy phrases (e.g., 'You\'re absolutely right!', 'Great catch!', 'Let me fix that now' (before verification), 'I see what you mean' (as acknowledgment of unverified claim)).
DISPUTE protocol must have all required fields documented: criterionId, reason, evidence array with {path, line, snippet}.
